{"cards": [{"name": "Ironwall Raider", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Orc Warrior", "oracle_text": "Haste
Menace", "flavor_text": ""The gate won't hold them for long, but it doesn't need to."", "power": "3", "toughness": "1", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Common red aggressive creature with two keywords. 3/1 for 3 is slightly below rate, but haste and menace provide significant value. Tests aggressive statlines while staying within common complexity bounds. The fragile toughness is a red-appropriate drawback for the aggressive keywords."}, {"name": "Worldburner Tyrant", "mana_cost": "{5}{R}{R}", "cmc": 7, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Dragon", "oracle_text": "Flying, trample, haste
When ~ enters, ~ deals damage equal to its power to each other creature.
At the beginning of your upkeep, ~ deals 2 damage to each opponent.", "flavor_text": "Where the tyrant flies, even the sky burns.", "power": "6", "toughness": "6", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Splashy mythic dragon that creates immediate board impact and ongoing pressure. The enters trigger acts as a one-sided board wipe, while the upkeep trigger provides inevitable damage. High mana cost appropriate for mythic power level. Triple keyword suite establishes immediate threat presence."}, {"name": "Wildwood Expedition", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "Every path leads somewhere. Not every somewhere is worth reaching.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple land ramp spell at common. Puts land directly into play but tapped to prevent abuse. 2 mana cost is fair for ramp effect. Tests clean 'search your library' templating. Provides mana acceleration while fixing colors in multicolor decks."}, {"name": "Thornback Behemoth", "mana_cost": "{4}{G}{G}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature — Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "Its hide turns arrows to splinters and its charge turns walls to rubble.", "power": "6", "toughness": "5", "complexity": 1, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Large green creature at common's power ceiling. 6/5 trample for 6 mana tests the upper bounds of common creature stats while remaining fair. Single keyword keeps complexity appropriate for common. Double green in cost reinforces green identity and prevents easy splashing."}, {"name": "Primal Awakening", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Aura", "oracle_text": "Enchant land
Enchanted land has "{T}: Add {G}{G}."
Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Uncommon Aura that transforms a land into a powerful engine. Doubles mana production while providing incremental creature growth. Tests Aura templating and triggered abilities. The mana acceleration and +1/+1 counter synergy creates build-around potential appropriate for uncommon."}]}
